mechanism_narrative: Stronger real-time retail sales momentum signals improving household demand and near-term earnings revisions; higher 3-month growth in RSAFS predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS snapshot as of t-2mo was 568215.0
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce positive 20-day return Rank IC above 0.03 in at least 60% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor income and recession-risk repricing; when UNRATE crosses above its 3-month average by a material margin, S&P 500 returns are negative over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 3-month moving average by more than 0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE snapshot as of t-1mo was 6.2
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward cases or mean triggered return is not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains near the zero lower bound, markets price future tightening and lower real equity multiples; the joint condition predicts negative 60-day returns.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized inflation crosses above 3% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot as of t-1mo was 0.08
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS joint trigger is followed by nonnegative average 60-day excess returns or if the interaction term has the wrong sign in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained industrial production gains indicate improving capacity utilization and cyclical earnings breadth; when INDPRO rises for three consecutive monthly observations, S&P 500 20-day returns are positive.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses into three consecutive monthly increases
evidence_refs: fact:latest INDPRO snapshot as of t-2mo was 107.1843
failure_condition: Reject if three-month INDPRO up-streaks are followed by positive 20-day returns in less than 50% of walk-forward cases or have negative average returns.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts lead construction activity, durable goods demand, and credit-sensitive sentiment; when HOUST crosses below its 12-month average, S&P 500 returns are negative over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:latest HOUST snapshot as of t-2mo was 1580.0
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside crossings do not precede lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-trigger periods in at least 60% of rolling samples.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll gains combined with a falling unemployment rate identify a broad labor recovery that supports income and earnings expectations; the joint PAYEMS-UNRATE improvement predicts positive 20-day returns.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months while UNRATE falls over the same 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest PAYEMS snapshot as of t-1mo was 143048.0
fact:latest UNRATE snapshot as of t-1mo was 6.2
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS up and UNRATE down state has no positive 20-day return premium over either single-series signal in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate tightens discount rates and liquidity conditions before earnings adjust; when FEDFUNDS crosses upward by more than 25 basis points in three months, 5-day returns are negative.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its level from 3 months earlier by more than 0.25 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot as of t-1mo was 0.08
failure_condition: Reject if upward FEDFUNDS crossings are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or by a nonnegative average triggered return.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail demand paired with weak industrial output signals supply bottlenecks and margin pressure rather than balanced growth; this RSAFS-INDPRO divergence predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth crosses above 2% while INDPRO 3-month growth is below 0%
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS snapshot as of t-2mo was 568215.0
fact:latest INDPRO snapshot as of t-2mo was 107.1843
failure_condition: Reject if the RSAFS-INDPRO divergence does not produce negative average 20-day returns or if an interaction model shows no incremental predictive power versus the two single proxies.
